response.title: Lead Policy Analyst
response.description: The Lead Policy Analyst will be responsible for leading a team of analysts in evaluating and formulating policies that affect state affairs. The successful candidate will work closely with stakeholders to ensure policies are aligned with both organizational objectives and public interests. This role requires both analytical and leadership skills to drive initiatives and projects to successful completion.

required_skills: Data analysis and interpretation using statistical software (e.g., SAS, R)
preferred_skills: Advanced degree in Public Policy or related field
Knowledge of state and federal legislation
Familiarity with grant writing and funding processes
requirements.education: Master's degree in Public Administration, Public Policy, or related field
